The following events take place in '''3976 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Mandalorian Wars]] begin with the [[Battle of Althir (first)|Battle of Althir]].<ref name="Warfare" /> The [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] begin conquering independent worlds along the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>
*[[Zaalbar]] is branded a 'madclaw' and banished from [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] after attacking his [[Chuundar|brother]]. He is later captured by slavers.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />
*[[Jolee Bindo]] exiles himself in the [[Shadowlands/Legends|Shadowlands]] of Kashyyyk, as well as [[Freyyr]].<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />
*The [[Bek–Vulkar gang war|war]] between the [[Swoop gang/Legends|Swoop Gangs]] of the [[Hidden Beks]] and the [[Black Vulkars/Legends|Black Vulkars]] in the [[Lower City]] of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] begins.<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic" />

==Births==
*[[Brianna]]<ref name="Age">{{WebCite|url=http://forums.obsidianent.com/index.php?showtopic=25061&st=0&p=184142&#entry184142|text=Age of the Characters|author=Avellone, Chris|date=2004-11-11|archivedate=20170701094824}}</ref>
*[[Mical]]<ref name="Age" />
*[[Visas Marr]]<ref name="Age" /> on [[Katarr/Legends|Katarr]]<ref name="KOTOR campaign guide">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>
